_publications._publicationTitle: NF1 deficiency drives metabolic reprogramming in ER+ breast cancer.

_contextSnippet: we found that NF1-45 cells were more sensitive to ERα inhibition by 4OHT, mitogen-activated protein kinase kinase (MEK) inhibition by COB, and mechanistic target of rapamycin (mTOR) inhibition by EVE
details: NF1-45 cells were more sensitive to ERα inhibition by 4OHT, MEK inhibition by COB, and mTOR inhibition by EVE compared to controls
